prompt_md: A team is replacing a core dependency (for example, an old data store) with a new one, while real users keep using the system. Arrange the steps into the order of a **safe, incremental migration** — one where the system keeps working and a rollback is always available.

items: Cut over reads to the new system gradually, starting with a small slice of traffic and ramping up while watching for errors
Find the seams: route all access to the dependency through a single thin abstraction layer
Decommission the old system once the new one has reliably served full traffic
Stand up the new system alongside the old one, with the old one still authoritative
Dual-write to both systems and backfill historical data, then compare results to verify they agree
